hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && cargo clippy --quiet --message-format=short 2>&1 | head -20 || true

echo "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path" | grep -q 'stream.rs' && grep -n 'unreachable!' "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path" && echo 'WARNING: unreachable!() found in stream.rs — panics in spawned tokio tasks crash silently. Use tracing::error! instead.' || true
echo "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path" | grep -q 'Cargo.lock' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit Cargo.lock directly. Use cargo commands instead.' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path" | grep -qF '.steve.jsonc' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit .steve.jsonc — this is a user config file, not source code.' && exit 1 || exit 0
